clientId.description: Origin/client of the API that created the order.

stockReservation.description: Whether stock was reserved for this order.

isOrderModified.description: Whether the order was modified after creation.

totalShippingDiscount.description: Sum of all freight related discounts.

ordersDiscount.description: A discount that applies to the whole order.

finalPrice.description: The final price of the whole order.

deliveryTimeType.description: Unit of the delivery time fields (e.g. DAYS, MINUTES).

donationAmount.description: Total donation amount in the order.

points.description: Loyalty/cashback points totals for the order.

deliveryAddress.description: The representation of order's delivery address

receiverName.description: Name from person will receive order

sellerSkuId.description: Seller's reference to the product variant

warehouses.description: Seller's warehouses holding the SKU. Each entry is a warehouse with the quantity allocated from it.

unitOriginalPrice.description: Base SKU price without any discounts.

unitPrice.description: SKU unit price with discounts, if discounts exist.

priceDiscount.description: Sum of the discounts multiplied by the 'quantity'.

isVirtual.description: Whether the item is a virtual/digital product.

sellerTransfer.description: Amount transferred to the seller for this item (BRL).

commissionAmount.description: Store commission amount charged on this item (BRL).

commission.description: Commission breakdown for this item: amount transferred to the seller and the store commission.

deliveryTimeType.description: Unit of the delivery time (e.g. DAYS, MINUTES).

deliveryType.description: Delivery type. Known values: PICKUP, DELIVERY, STANDARD, DELIVERY_OWNER_STORE.

appliedPromotions.description: Promotions applied to this item, linking it to entries in the order-level 'promotions' array.

quantity.description: Item quantity the promotion applied to.

valueApplied.description: Discount in BRL granted to this item by the promotion.

originalShipmentId.description: The id of the original shipment

code.description: Code referring to the Shipment Event.

deliveredDate.description: The date on which the shipment was delivered

code.description: Code referring to the Shipment Item Event.

transactionId.description: The Id used for the payment transaction

verifyToken.description: Represents the Order in encrypted form

promotions.description: Promotions applied to the order. Empty or null when no promotion applies; otherwise each element describes one applied promotion or coupon.

value.description: Configured discount: amount in BRL when 'fixed', percentage when 'percentage'.

valueApplied.description: Amount in BRL actually deducted from the order by this promotion.

sellerId.description: Seller that owns the promotion; null for marketplace-wide promotions.

items.description: SKU ids affected by this promotion; empty for order-level promotions.

onlyRangeDiscount.description: Whether the discount applies only within a configured range/tier.

campaignShare.description: Cost split between store and seller on co-funded campaigns.

coupon.description: Coupon details when the promotion is coupon-based.

code.description: Coupon code entered by the customer.

metadata.description: Free-form display metadata (e.g. title, subtitle, collectionsSlug).

substatus.description: Latest lifecycle event of the order. 'code' maps to a status family: 100 Canceled, 200 Paid, 300 Billed, 400 Sent, 500 Delivered, 600 Returned, 700 Refunded, 900 Replaced.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

orderRef.description: Internal order reference (Mkplace internal use; not a public/external reference).

payments.description: Deprecated. No longer used; always empty ([] or null).

points.description: Loyalty points applied to the order, when applicable.

currencyAmount.description: Monetary value (BRL) of the points used.

ref.description: Reference to the campaign the points belong to.

donations.description: Donations attached to the order, when applicable.
